meta.name: S Utkantha Priyadarshini Reddy
meta.tagline: Motivated and detail-oriented MCA graduate (2026) with a strong foundation in software development, programming, database management, and problem-solving. Passionate about building innovative, scalable, and user-focused applications.

bullets: Pursuing MCA with focus on software development, data structures, algorithms, and emerging technologies.
Actively building projects in deep learning, full-stack web development, and AI-powered applications.
Engaging in coding challenges, collaborative teamwork, and research-oriented problem solving.
Graduated with 8.3 CGPA; developed strong competencies in analytical thinking, structured communication, and instructional design.
Gained expertise in innovative teaching methodologies, curriculum planning, and interpersonal engagement.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) – Physics & Physical Science
bullets: Graduated with 9.4 CGPA, securing First Position in the batch.
Built a strong foundation in analytical problem-solving, quantitative reasoning, and scientific research aptitude.

projects.title: EduLearn – E-Learning Platform
projects.description: Designed and deployed a fully responsive e-learning web application using HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JavaScript, hosted on Vercel with CI/CD via GitHub Actions. Implemented mobile-first responsive design ensuring seamless compatibility.

projects.title: Yamazone – E-Commerce Demo
projects.description: Built a full-stack e-commerce web application inspired by Amazon, with a Python Flask backend and HTML/CSS/JavaScript frontend. Implemented product catalog API, Add-to-Cart drawer with live subtotal, and Buy Now order simulation.
